CONTENT.Club career: Born in Jerez de la Frontera, Cádiz, Andalusia, Bueno joined Sevilla FC's youth setup at the age of ten, from hometown side AD Marianistas Jerez. He made his senior debut with the reserves on 10 October 2021, coming on as a second-half substitute for Juanlu Sánchez in a 5–1 Primera División RFEF away loss against Villarreal CF B.Bueno started the 2022–23 season as a full member of the B-team, now in Segunda Federación, and renewed his contract until 2026 on 15 May 2023. He made his first team – and La Liga – debut twelve days later, starting in a 2–1 home loss against Real Madrid.
CONTENT.External links: Manu Bueno at BDFutbolManu Bueno at Soccerway
CONTENT.International career: On 26 May 2021, Bueno was called up to Spain at under-17 and under-18 levels in 2021 and 2022, respectively.

SUMMARY: Manuel "Manu" Bueno Sebastián (born 27 July 2004) is a Spanish professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Sevilla Atlético.
